metadata.description: LLM-maintained personal wiki skills for Claude Code, backed by Roam Research via roam-mcp

plugins.name: wiki-skills
plugins.description: Five skills implementing Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern against a Roam Research graph (via roam-mcp): wiki-init, wiki-ingest, wiki-query, wiki-lint, wiki-update. Source text is uploaded paragraph-per-block so every excerpt has a stable ((uid)) for citation.
